project_context.vibe: Maldives-specific concierge, local, trustworthy, luxury, colorful, fast, mobile-app-like. High contrast navy with warm cream backgrounds and emerald/coral accents.

accent.description: Coral/Pink for offers, alerts, and badges

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tighter leading-tight text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-slate-900
scale.overline: text-xs font-sans tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-teal-700 font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8) and Bento Grids. Everything must feel like a premium mobile app. No jagged edges.

mobile_first_rules.bottom_nav: Sticky bottom bar using Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-t border-stone-200). Must contain Home, Shop, AI Concierge, Cart, Profile.
mobile_first_rules.floating_actions: WhatsApp button and AI Chat button must float above the bottom nav (e.g., bottom-20 right-4) so they don't overlap with the nav.
mobile_first_rules.tap_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements to ensure mobile accessibility.

grids.bento_marketing: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 gap-6. Mix shapes (Hero col-span-full md:col-span-4, Square col-span-2).

surfaces.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all bg-teal-700 text-white hover:bg-teal-600 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.accent: rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all bg-rose-500 text-white hover:bg-rose-600 hover:-translate-y-0.5

badges.pre_order: bg-teal-100 text-teal-800 text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full
badges.original: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full

images_and_media.hero_overlay: NEVER use flat black blanket. Use bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 via-black/20 to-transparent.

image_urls.description: Elegant woman with shopping bags walking by Milan Cathedral - high fashion luxury vibe
Sleek car parked in front of luxury store - premium delivery vibe
Fenty Beauty high end cosmetics flatlay
Modern electronics, apple laptop, gadgets flatlay
DHL delivery truck for shipping logistics section

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role (e.g. data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='ai-chat-trigger').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on teal/navy has high contrast. Test against APCA standards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Lucide-React icons extensively for standard UI elements and WhatsApp/Social triggers. Do not rely on image logos for app icons.

Import Cormorant Garamond via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');
In tailwind.config.js, set fontFamily: { serif: ['Cormorant Garamond', 'serif'], sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'] }.
Implement the Sticky Bottom Nav strictly for mobile (hidden on md/lg screens).
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Forms, Dropdowns) but customize them heavily using the rounded-2xl and stone-200 border aesthetic.
Ensure all sections use generous padding (py-16 md:py-24).
Use the provided category images in Bento grid structures to showcase the main categories (Garments, Cosmetics, Electronics, Gaming, Shoes, Musical, Sports).
